mnemonics.title: TCP Features
mnemonics.content: TRUCKS: Three-way handshake, Reliability, Ordered delivery, Connection-oriented, Keep-alive, Stream-oriented

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a water pipe that expands/shrinks based on network flow - wider when clear, narrower when blocked

analogies.analogy: TCP is like certified mail with tracking, UDP is like dropping a postcard in a mailbox
